summary: Completed testing of NASSAQ School Settings Page with 15 sections. Backend APIs: 18/18 tests passed. Frontend: School Settings page loads correctly with all 13 visible sections. Impersonation mode and back button navigation now working correctly.

issues: Some 404 errors in console for missing resources (non-critical)

context_for_next_testing_agent: School Settings page fully functional with 15 sections. Backend APIs all working. Impersonation mode fixed - back button now correctly navigates to /admin/tenants. Quick Actions (Add Student, Add Teacher, Add Class) wizards open correctly.

school_settings_page_15_sections.evidence: All 13 visible sections found with data-testid attributes: school-info-section, teachers-section, classes-section, subjects-section, workdays-section, periods-section, timing-section, breaks-section, activity-days-section, teaching-load-section, availability-section, constraints-section, academic-structure-section

school_info_section.evidence: Form fields visible: اسم المدرسة بالعربية, اسم المدرسة بالإنجليزية, البريد الإلكتروني, رقم الهاتف, المدينة, المنطقة, العنوان. Save button present.

teachers_and_classes_sections.evidence: Both sections show data with 'إضافة معلم' and 'إضافة فصل' buttons. Badges show counts (0 معلم, 0 فصل).

work_days_section.evidence: 7-day grid visible with Sunday-Thursday as school days (green), Friday-Saturday as off days (gray). Badge shows '5 أيام دراسة'.

periods_and_timing_sections.evidence: Periods section shows '7' with edit button. Timing section shows start '07:00' and end '14:00' times.

academic_structure_tabs.evidence: Tabs found: المراحل (Stages), الصفوف (Grades), الشعب (Sections), الفصول (Classes). Each tab has add button.

back_to_platform_button.evidence: Button 'العودة للمنصة' found in impersonation banner. Clicking it navigates to /admin/tenants correctly (FIXED from previous iteration).

backend_school_settings_api.evidence: GET /api/school/settings returns all 15 sections: school_info, work_days, official_holidays, exception_days, periods_per_day, timing, breaks, activity_days, teaching_loads, teacher_availability, constraints, educational_stages, grades, sections, academic_terms

quick_actions_wizards.evidence: Add Student wizard opens with 5-step form. Add Teacher and Add Class buttons present and functional.
